markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 173. Intermunicipal Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 173.352 — Tax Rate

The sales and use tax shall be imposed at the rate of the highest combination of local sales and use taxes imposed at the time of the district’s creation in any local governmental jurisdiction that is part of the district.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: The sales and use tax shall be imposed at the rate of the highest combination of local sales and use taxes imposed at the time of the district’s creation in any local governmental jurisdiction that is part of the district.
